revision.text: -- This module implements {{noping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl('User:' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: Protected Module:No ping: [[Wikipedia:Lua/Modules|High-risk Lua module]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
revision.text: -- This module implements {{noping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl('User:' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: let's prepare this for 'global' usage. avoid having to correct it in the future
revision.text: -- This module implements {{noping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: added link colour based on whether page exists
revision.text: -- This module implements {{noping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] or username local color = '#cc2200' if mw.title.new(username, mw.site.namespaces.User.name).exists then color = '#0645ad' end label = '' .. label .. '' url = format('[%s %s]', url, label) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: Undid revision 775971588 by [[Special:Contributions/Jc86035|Jc86035]] ([[User talk:Jc86035|talk]]) Caused the template to ping users
revision.text: -- This module implements {{noping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: Update template name per edit request
revision.text: -- This module implements {{no ping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: Update template name per edit request
revision.text: -- This module implements {{no ping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

-- This module implements {{no ping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: implement detection of argument starting with "User:", cf. talk page, sandbox and testcases. feel free to revert me/ask for a self-revert if there is any issue with this.
revision.text: -- This module implements {{no ping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = "" if (username:sub(1, (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':'):len()) == (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':')) then url = fullUrl(username) else url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) end url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting
revision.text: -- This module implements {{no ping}}. local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local url = "" if (username:sub(1, (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':'):len()) == (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':')) then url = fullUrl(username) else url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. username) end url = tostring(url) local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: merge: general improvement for anti-abuse and unaffecting others elsewhere; using modules can consider whether to reintroduce a user link for TAs
revision.text: local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] local url = "" local targetUser = username if (username:sub(1, (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':'):len()) == (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':')) then targetUser = username:sub((mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':'):len() + 1) end if targetUser:sub(1, 2) == '~2' then -- Temporary user target; use internal contributions link url = mw.site.namespaces.Special.name .. ':Contributions/' .. targetUser url = format('[[%s|%s]]', url, label or username) else -- Named user target; use external link url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. targetUser) url = tostring(url) url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) end ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
revision.text: local p = {} function p.main(frame) local args = frame:getParent().args return p._main(args) end function p._main(args) local ret = {} local fullUrl = mw.uri.fullUrl local format = string.format for i, username in ipairs(args) do local label = args['label' .. tostring(i)] local url = "" local targetUser = username if (username:sub(1, (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':'):len()) == (mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':')) then targetUser = username:sub((mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':'):len() + 1) end if targetUser:sub(1, 2) == '~2' then -- Temporary user target; use internal contributions link url = mw.site.namespaces.Special.name .. ':Contributions/' .. targetUser url = format('[[%s|%s]]', url, label or username) else -- Named user target; use external link url = fullUrl(mw.site.namespaces.User.name .. ':' .. targetUser) url = tostring(url) url = format('[%s %s]', url, label or username) end ret[#ret + 1] = url end ret = mw.text.listToText(ret) ret = '' .. ret .. '' return ret end return p
